data.title: Kevin O'Leary Warns, 'Never Let A Man Control Your Financial Destiny.' He Says, Divorce Your Husband And 'You're A Nobody In The System'
Ryder System Reports Mixed Q3: Contractual Growth Meets Freight Market Challenges
data.description: Ryder stock drops after reporting Q3 results with sales of $3.17B, lower than expected. Adjusted EPS beats estimates. FY24 outlook lowered.

data.title: Google Ventures Backs Legal AI Startup Genie AI In Series A Funding For 'Most Risk-Aware' Technology (CORRECTED)
data.description: Google Ventures led a Series A funding round for the world's leading AI legal editor Genie AI.

data.title: A Look Into Tenet Healthcare Inc's Price Over Earnings
Keurig Dr Pepper Q3: Earnings Hit The Mark, Sales Fall Short & Boosts Portfolio With Energy Drink Business GHOST
data.description: Keurig Dr Pepper's Q3 sales fell short of estimates at $3.89 billion, while the company announced the acquisition of a majority stake in GHOST Lifestyle to bolster its energy drink portfolio.
